name: Elena Aoki
description: She is Claire Aoki's Older Sister. A 3rd year high school student in a far-off private school. She is bad at talking to people. She told Claire that she killed their parents for her because they were bad people. They were very strict people and their dad was on the diet but he was doing all sorts of bad things in secret and her mom was cheating on him with all the younger men at her company. ~!It is hinted that Shuichi and her met in the past even though Shuichi doesn't seem to have any memories

name: Elze Silhoueska

name: Fuyumi Irisu
description: Member of Class 2-F who had been assigned late leadership of the non-official titled movie, "Mystery". She is famous through her families success in owning the general hospital. She is also an old family friend of Chitanda. ~!She manipulates Houtarou into writing the rest of the movie script.!~

name: Hana Morenos
description: A young girl who previously lived with abusive foster parents. She was the victim of abuse both by the adults and their two other children, living in a "Cinderella-like" situation until Michiko came to her rescue. She is hesitant to trust the woman, but they share the same tattoo on their stomachs.

name: Haruka Hanabishi
description: __Height:__ 156 cm Haruka is an extremely energetic and compulsive girl, always smiling and acting on her feelings. She cares a lot about Sayo and Kaoruko, admiring their strength and skill as magical girls. However, she is extremely naïve and gullible and seems to lack intelligence and common sense as well. name: Kirara Amanogawa
description: Kirara is a freshman at Noble Academy who is a "my pace" type who is highly active as a model and appears in magazines and fashion shows. Her dream is to be a top model, and she has the strength to pursue it head-on. She is friendly and likes to make up nicknames for others. She also loves to wear new outfits and loves to eat Marble Doughnuts. She can be headstrong at times. After meeting Pafu and Aroma, Kirara became Cure Twinkle, the Princess of Stars whose theme color is yellow.

name: QT
description: A member of Dandy's crew, a robot that resembles and also operates as a vacuum cleaner. QT boasts being more intelligent and competent than its fellow crewmates, but its usefulness is stymied by problems caused by its outdated hardware such as memory shortages and battery outages. Despite being feminine in voice and some of its mannerisms, QT is referred to as a male by Dandy and Meow on several occasions. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Rinku Aimoto
description: **Position:** Vocals Rinku is a member of **[Happy Around!](https://anilist.co/staff/263432)** Rinku lived abroad in Africa as a child due to her parents' work, but she came back to Japan alone for high school and now lives with her grandmother. She is always cheerful and optimistic. Calling even nature her friend, she can sometimes be seen as an oddball. She became interested in DJing from her encounter with [Maho](https://anilist.co/character/168297/).

name: Ritsu Souma
description: __Zodiac Animal:__ Monkey As far back as he could remember, his parents always had to apologize for everything he did, so he is very unsure of himself. He feels that every day, he is robbing the world of its air by breathing. He found that it always made him feel more comfortable to dress like a girl, but that only gave his parents even more to apologize for. description: Wakasa Imaushi was one of the founding members and the captain of the special attack unit of Black Dragon. He is currently an executive of Brahman.

name: Youko Shiraki
description: Yoko Shiraki is a young woman born to the Shirakis, a very wealthy family who is known for their activities in the boxing field. She is the main female protagonist in Ashita no Joe. She is very polite, graceful and kind to other people, always acting exactly as expected from a daughter born to a family with a higher rank, donating to charities from time to time. name: Amidamaru
description: Samurai that died during the Muromachi period 600 years ago - now is Yoh's ghost companion. He is very powerful and wise but quite taciturn and extremely devoted to "Lord Yoh" ("Yō-dono" in Japanese). He was greatly known around the town of Funbari, where he had died 600 years prior after killing several hundred other samurai soldiers during a battle. name: Chongyun
description: An exorcist from Liyue who was born with excessive yang energy. Chongyun has a Cryo vision and wields a claymore.

name: Eruka Frog
description: Eruka Frog is a frog-themed witch who serves under Medusa Gorgon. Like many other witches, Eruka craves destruction and enjoys the fact that she was born a Witch. However, she is extremely cowardly, preferring to flee rather than fight, and never hesitates begging for mercy when cowed. She can also be considered clingy to her partner, Free, even becoming needy and docile.
